visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene begins in a brightly lit Costco warehouse. A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white blouse and a silver crossbody bag, stands in front of pallets of fruit. She holds a transparent plastic container of large blueberries. She smiles broadly, looking directly at the camera, and points to the blueberries. In the background, other shoppers in casual attire move between stacks of boxes labeled 'Korean Shine Muscat.' Large colorful text overlays appear at the top. (2) A close-up shot focuses on the blueberry container held by the woman's hands. The label 'Fruitist' is clearly visible. The blueberries inside are notably large, dark purple, and appear fresh. The camera then cuts back to the woman as she gestures with her hand while talking, showing a range of expressive facial movements from concern during a price comparison to delight. (3) The setting shifts to an indoor residential space. Two women are seated at a white table. The woman from the previous scene is on the left, now wearing a dark purple top. To her right is another woman wearing a yellow striped shirt and a bright red Kangol bucket hat. They hold individual large blueberries up to the camera before placing them in their mouths. Their expressions turn into wide-eyed surprise and smiles of satisfaction as they chew. A small green plate with several blueberries sits on the table between them.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 超便宜. [Slogan]: 巨大藍莓. (2) [Subtitle]: 這510克只要269元. (3) [Subtitle]: 是智利的. [Slogan]: $429. (4) [Subtitle]: 智利藍莓跟它價差160. (5) [Subtitle]: 直接變成500多元. (6) [Subtitle]: 哇 最重要. (7) [Subtitle]: 我們這裡吃這個大藍莓很好吃. (8) [Subtitle]: 這樣半公斤只要200多. [Variety]: 超級划算. (9) [Subtitle]: 真的 而且前一陣子都沒有. (10) [Subtitle]: 所以我覺得秘魯這一波一定要拿. (11) [Subtitle]: 而且很漂亮. (12) [Subtitle]: 我們剛才看了都沒有. (13) [Subtitle]: 那個發霉或出水. (14) [Subtitle]: 超級顧眼睛. (15) [Subtitle]: 回去試看看這一波有沒有值得. (16) [Subtitle]: 超巨大藍莓 來看這一批如何. (17) [Subtitle]: 嗯 好甜啊. (18) [Subtitle]: 更甜了. [Variety]: 更甜了. (19) [Subtitle]: 我覺得是買藍莓的季節. (20) [Subtitle]: 大家趕快趁現在買. (21) [Subtitle]: 超甜 超好吃.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, at least 6 background shoppers and staff in the warehouse section.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long dark hair, wearing a white blouse and later a purple top. The second woman wears a yellow and white striped shirt with a red Kangol bucket hat.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical Costco warehouse interior with high ceilings, industrial shelving, and large quantities of boxed produce. Later, a clean domestic interior with toys and a sofa in the soft-focus background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A clear female voice speaks in Mandarin with a high-pitched, energetic tone and rapid speech rate. She sounds enthusiastic and persuasive, like a shopping vlogger. In the background, an upbeat electronic pop track plays with a steady, driving rhythm and synthesized textures. The acoustic environment suggests a large indoor space. (2) A sharp, high-frequency digital 'ping' sound effect triggers as the price is shown on screen. The narrator's pitch variability increases as she compares two products. (3) The audio environment transitions to a quieter room tone. Two female voices interact with high emotional arousal, expressing amazement through rising intonations. The audible sound of soft chewing occurs as they taste the fruit. The music bed remains constant at 124 BPM, maintaining a positive vibe. (4) More digital 'pop' sound effects emphasize the final text overlays. The vocal density remains high until the final second, concluding with an enthusiastic exclamation about the fruit's sweetness.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Comparison -> Proof -> Taste Test -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a shopping recommendation for Costco members. It identifies a high-value product (Peruvian blueberries) by comparing its price and quality against a more expensive Chilean alternative, then validates the recommendation through a positive taste test.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video focuses entirely on a specific product (Fruitist blueberries) from a specific retailer (Costco), detailing price points and quality benefits in a promotional style.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social media editing styles with heavy text overlays and upbeat music to drive engagement. The contrast between the warehouse shopping experience and the cozy home tasting adds authenticity.
